title: Pollster Nate Silver says Trump is favored to win in November
shortDescription: The political pollster says the former president is "favored by a slightly larger degree than ... anticipated."

title: Biden vs Trump key talking points
shortDescription: As the 2024 presidential election nears, each candidate is reemphasizing his messages.

title: EXCLUSIVE: VA Senate candidate says he was blown up in combat. His record doesn’t show that.
shortDescription: In his campaign Cao has stressed his military service on radio shows, podcast episodes and in television news segments. Cao has said that he’s been “shot at,” “blown up,” and has “scars” from his time in the military.

title: Democrats fear ballot delivery delays after US post office changes
shortDescription: Mail-in voting was immensely popular in 2020, and both parties are aiming to get more people to vote remotely in the 2024 presidential election.

title: House Republicans want to arrest Merrick Garland, but aren't sure how
shortDescription: Some House Republicans want to hold Merrick Garland in "inherent contempt" of Congress, but not many lawmakers knows what that means.

title: Did Biden and Big Tech censor conservatives? Debate still rages
shortDescription: Murthy v. Missouri was the latest conservative grievance that the Biden administration colludes with tech companies to violate Americans' free speech.

title: Biden, Trump locked in a dead heat in new Marquette poll
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump are in a dead heat in Wisconsin with just about four months until Election Day

title: Biden to issue thousands of military pardons
shortDescription: Former service members convicted for same-sex intimacy under a military anti-gay law will be pardoned by President Joe Biden.

title: JD Vance would be a 'little' disappointed if he is not Trump's VP
shortDescription: Ohio Senator J.D. Vance made his case to join former President Donald Trump on the Republican ticket this November in an appearance on FOX & Friends.

title: Rep. Jamaal Bowman unseated in NY, Boebert wins GOP nod
shortDescription: A shift after the latest primary elections left New York's Congressman Jamal Bowman to lose his seat, signaling a rift within the Democratic Party.

title: Commission on Presidential Debates cancels contracts for election year
shortDescription: Weeks after Trump and Biden bucked debate tradition, the Commission on Presidential Debates has stepped down.

title: Judge skeptical of Trump bid to remove docs from trial | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: President Joe Biden's approach to Thursday's debate. | Biden pardons thousands of veterans convicted under a military law that banned gay sex.

title: Supreme Court says Biden can weigh in on social media misinformation
shortDescription: The decision threw out a conservative challenge to the administration's push to get social media companies to remove posts it considered misinformation.

title: Former Republican Rep. Adam Kinzinger endorses Biden ahead of debate
shortDescription: 'It’s because of my unwavering support for democracy, that today, as a proud conservative, I am endorsing Joe Biden for reelection,' Kinzinger said.
